# SecTransformMetaAttributeType.requiresOutboundConnection

**Case**

The attribute requires an outbound connection.

## Declaration

```swift
case requiresOutboundConnection
```

## Discussion

This metadata has a default value of [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] for the output attribute but is [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false] for all other attributes.
title: SecTransformMetaAttributeType.requiresOutboundConnection
